title: Golden Apple Recipe Back
description: This mod adds craftable enchanted golden apples to your game!
body:
🟡 Golden Apple Recipe Back
A simple mod that brings back the classic Golden Apple recipe!

This mod reactivates the classic Golden Apple recipe in Minecraft, allowing you to craft it using 8 gold blocks + 1 apple on a crafting table, just like in the older versions of the game.

![fgh](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f2484ae90ad833350f088ffd378d172516db5f52.png)

🔧 Features:

• Compatible with most mods and datapacks.

• Does not alter other recipes or game mechanics.

• Ideal for survival and PvP servers.

📦 Dependencies:

• Fabric and Quilt: [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)

🍎 Bring back nostalgia — relive the moments!

• [See all my mods](https://modrinth.com/user/arthurdallanelo) •
